items.text: Inspect the video editor files and current finalize checkpoint, then instrument the player rerender paths for T1.
Implement player stability fixes in useTimelineData/RemotionPreview and remove instrumentation (T2-T6).
Implement navigation, render button, text editing, play control, and drag-drop fixes (T7-T12).
Perform the scoped stability audit, run verification commands, and update finalize checkpoints plus final summary (T13).
